description_long: This airplane features a highly stylized, futuristic design with a predominantly black body accented by red highlights and subtle patterns. The wings are broad and rounded, with sharp, blade-like extensions protruding from the central fuselage, giving it an aggressive, almost predatory appearance. At each wingtip, there are cylindrical engine-like structures, one with a red tip and the other with a white tip, suggesting asymmetrical detailing. The fuselage is slender and connects the two large, disc-shaped wing sections, while the tail section is integrated into the rear wing structure without a distinct vertical stabilizer. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with a hard, metallic look. There are no visible windows or cockpit features, and the landing gear is not apparent, giving the airplane a seamless, almost conceptual aesthetic.
description: A sleek, black and red futuristic airplane with broad, rounded wings, sharp blade-like extensions, and cylindrical engine structures at the wingtips. The design is aggressive and streamlined, with a smooth, glossy surface and no visible cockpit or landing gear.
description_view_0: From this top-down view, the broad, rounded wings and sharp central blade-like extensions are prominent, with the red and white-tipped cylindrical structures at each wingtip clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the disc-like shape of the wings and the vertical alignment of the blade-like extensions, as well as the cylindrical engine structures protruding from each end.
description_view_2: The bottom view shows the smooth, continuous underside of the airplane, with the rounded wings and central fuselage visible, and the engine structures at the tips.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the disc-shaped wings, vertical blade-like extensions, and the contrasting red and white-tipped engine structures.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with broad, rounded wings and sharp, blade-like extensions; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin cylindrical jet engines mounted at the wingtips.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with no distinct vertical stabilizer; unconventional design with tail structure blending into the rear wing.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit or canopy; cockpit placement is not apparent from the exterior.
